testsuite.name: runner.CucumberTest
testsuite.system-out:
?[1mScenario:?[22m Melihat Item pada Cart ?[90m# classpath:features/Cart.feature:8?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser membuka halaman Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_membuka_halaman_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser melihat item yang telah ditambahkan pada Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.user_melihat_item_yang_telah_ditambahkan_pada_cart()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Remove Item dari Cart ?[90m# classpath:features/Cart.feature:11?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser membuka halaman Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_membuka_halaman_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser menekan tombol Remove pada Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.user_menekan_tombol_remove_pada_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mItem berhasil dihapus dari Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.item_berhasil_dihapus_dari_cart()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Continue Shopping ?[90m# classpath:features/Cart.feature:15?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser membuka halaman Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_membuka_halaman_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser menekan tombol Continue Shopping?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.userMenekanTombolContinueShopping()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser kembali ke halaman Inventory?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.userKembaliKeHalamanInventory()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Membuka halaman Checkout ?[90m# classpath:features/Cart.feature:19?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser membuka halaman Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_membuka_halaman_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser menekan tombol Checkout?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.user_checkout()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser diarahkan ke halaman Checkout?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.user_redirect_checkout()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Melihat Detail Produk ?[90m# classpath:features/Inventory.feature:6?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser menekan detail item yang diberikan?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.InventoryStepDef.user_menekan_detail_item()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser redirect pada page detail inventory?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.InventoryStepDef.user_redirect_detail_inventory()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Menambahkan Produk ke Cart ?[90m# classpath:features/Inventory.feature:11?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser melihat item keranjang ditambah?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.InventoryStepDef.user_melihat_item_keranjang_ditambah()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Menghapus Produk dari Inventory ?[90m# classpath:features/Inventory.feature:16?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menghapus item pada button remove?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.InventoryStepDef.user_menghapus_item()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser melihat item keranjang dihapus?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.InventoryStepDef.user_melihat_item_keranjang_dihapus()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Checkout dengan data kosong ?[90m# classpath:features/checkout.feature:9?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser membuka halaman Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_membuka_halaman_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menekan tombol Checkout?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.user_checkout()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser memasukkan First Name ?[1m""?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.input_first_name(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser memasukkan Last Name ?[1m""?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.input_last_name(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser memasukkan Zip atau Postal Code ?[1m""?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.input_postal_code(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menekan tombol Continue Checkout?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.continue_checkout()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mMuncul pesan error blank?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.error_blank()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Checkout berhasil ?[90m# classpath:features/checkout.feature:17?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menambahkan item pada button add to cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_menambahkan_item_pada_button_add_to_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser membuka halaman Cart?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_membuka_halaman_cart()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menekan tombol Checkout?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CartStepDef.user_checkout()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser memasukkan First Name ?[1m"Sayid"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.input_first_name(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser memasukkan Last Name ?[1m"Ridho"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.input_last_name(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser memasukkan Zip atau Postal Code ?[1m"12312"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.input_postal_code(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menekan tombol Continue Checkout?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.continue_checkout()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser melakukan checkout overview?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.checkout_overview()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mCheckout berhasil!?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CheckoutStepDef.checkout_success()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Login berhasil ?[90m# classpath:features/login.feature:3?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser login sebagai ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m dengan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.CommonStepDef.user_login_sebagai(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser berhasil masuk ke Dashboard?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_berhasil_masuk_ke_dashboard()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Password salah ?[90m# classpath:features/login.feature:8?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser berada pada halaman login?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_berada_pada_halaman_login()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser memasukkan username ?[1m"standard_user"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_memasukkan_username(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser memasukkan password ?[1m"123456"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_memasukkan_password(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menekan tombol Login?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_menekan_tombol_login()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mMuncul pesan error?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.muncul_pesan_error()?[39m
?[1mScenario:?[22m Username kosong ?[90m# classpath:features/login.feature:16?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser berada pada halaman login?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_berada_pada_halaman_login()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser memasukkan username ?[1m""?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_memasukkan_username(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser memasukkan password ?[1m"secret_sauce"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_memasukkan_password(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser menekan tombol Login?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.user_menekan_tombol_login()?[39m ?[32m✔?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mMuncul pesan error?[39m ?[90m# com.ridho.stepdef.LoginStepDef.muncul_pesan_error()?[39m

Jul 17, 2026 8:43:45 PM org.junit.platform.launcher.core.DiscoveryIssueNotifier logIssues WARNING: TestEngine with ID 'cucumber' encountered a non-critical issue during test discovery:
(1) [WARNING] The classpath resource selector 'features' should not be used to select features in a package. Use the package selector with 'features' instead
